allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mahfuzcmt/pingpath/main/scripts/deploy_vps.sh" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — $\($r.Headers['Content-Length']\) bytes — public, reachable" } catch { Write-Output "FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/mahfuzcmt/pingpath" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output \("private={0} default_branch={1} pushed_at={2}" -f $j.private, $j.default_branch, $j.pushed_at\) } catch { Write-Output \("status=" + $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mahfuzcmt/pingpath/main/scripts/deploy_vps.sh" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — public, reachable" } catch { Write-Output "FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
